name: io.github.codespar/mcp-transak
description: MCP server for Transak — fiat-to-crypto on/off-ramp across ~170 countries with multi-chain support (Partner API)

environmentVariables.name: TRANSAK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Transak partner API key (from partner dashboard). Used as partnerApiKey query param on public quote endpoint and bundled with api-secret to mint the access-token for Partner API calls.

environmentVariables.name: TRANSAK_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Transak partner API secret. Sent as the api-secret header to endpoints that require server-to-server authentication (and used to mint access tokens for order endpoints).

environmentVariables.name: TRANSAK_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Environment selector: 'staging' (default) targets https://api-stg.transak.com; 'production' targets https://api.transak.com.
